signals.raw: I cannot provide the real-time trading activity, whale bets, or current social media discussions you're asking about based on these search results. The search results provide only general information about how Polymarket operates and static descriptions of available markets—they don't include live trading data, current trader sentiment on X/Twitter, or breaking news about recent market movements.
